title: Gold Netherite
description: Makes netherite the way it should be since its 50% gold
body:
Here a resource pack that make your game just a bit more acurate. To make netherite more gold intead of purple ( couse that has always been bothering me). And its just  how it should look. [Here](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ab67601865b725316bc02b1d1d15076369239ef7.png)  you can see a show case of what I did, a wall that I decorated a bit with item frames and and armor stand.
You can whitness more immages in the [gallery](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/gold-netherite/gallery).

Pls get this to 50 downloads
